name: AARP Arizona Office
personalization_paragraph: Arizona recorded 16,136 hit-and-run crashes in 2024 killing 86 people; one in eight crashes involves a driver who flees and roughly 90 percent of hit-and-run cases go unsolved. The data file pairs the headline finding with the named-corridor breakdown, methodology, and the raw records behind it.
